name: Lazy Loading for Expensive Resources
description: Expensive resources (images, large datasets) must be loaded lazily, not in viewDidLoad or init.
auto_fix_hint: Use lazy var or load on demand in the getter

name: Pagination for List Data
description: Lists of unbounded data (transactions, notifications) must use pagination or infinite scroll, not fetching all records.
auto_fix_hint: Add page/offset parameters to the API call and implement incremental loading

examples.bad: let transactions = try await api.getAllTransactions() // ❌ Returns thousands of rows
examples.good: let transactions = try await api.getTransactions(page: currentPage, limit: 20)

name: Image Caching
description: Images loaded from network must be cached. Re-downloading on every cell reuse degrades performance.
auto_fix_hint: Use SDWebImage, Kingfisher, or AsyncImage with caching policy

name: Avoid N+1 Query Pattern
description: Fetching individual records inside a loop causes N+1 API/DB calls. Batch fetch instead.
auto_fix_hint: Batch-fetch all required records in a single API call with IDs list

examples.good:
let ids = transactions.map(\.merchantId)
let merchants = try await api.getMerchants(ids: ids) // ✅ 1 API call
